*�����������������*4"""
Extension classes enhance TouchDesigner components with python. An
extension is accessed via ext.ExtensionClassName from any operator
within the extended component. If the extension is promoted via its
Promote Extension parameter, all its attributes with capitalized names
can be accessed externally, e.g. op('yourComp').PromotedFunction().

Help: search "Extensions" in wiki
"""

from pathlib import Path
from TDStoreTools import StorageManager
TDF = op.TDModules.mod.TDFunctions

import codecs

class CppParsTemplateGenExt:
	"""
	CppParsTemplateGenExt description
	"""

	def __init__(self, ownerComp):
		# The component to which this extension is attached
		self.ownerComp = ownerComp

		self.path = self.ownerComp.par.Path = project.folder

		self.customOpPars = None

		# Cache template and schemas OPs
		self.parametershTemplate = op('text_parametershTemplate')
		self.parameterscppTemplate = op('text_parameterscppTemplate')

		self.enumDefSchema = op('schemas/enumDefSchema')
		self.baseParSchema = op('schemas/baseParSchema')
		self.defaultNumParSchema = op('schemas/defaultNumParSchema')
		self.fullNumParSchema = op('schemas/fullNumParSchema')
		self.tupleParSchema = op('schemas/tupleParSchema')
		self.stringParSchema = op('schemas/stringParSchema')
		self.typesSchema = op('schemas/typesSchema')

		op('text_parametersh').clear()
		op('text_parameterscpp').clear()

	def Generate(self):
		self.sourceparameterscomp = op(self.ownerComp.par.Sourceparameterscomp)
		self.path = project.folder if not self.ownerComp.par.Path.eval() else self.ownerComp.par.Path.eval()

		# If user removed default path and forgot to specify a new path, reset to default path
		if not self.ownerComp.par.Path:
			self.ownerComp.par.Path = project.folder

		if not self.sourceparameterscomp:
			ui.messageBox('Source parameter COMP is missing.',
							'You must specify a COMP with a set of custom parameters.',
							buttons=['Ok'])
			return

		# self.customOpPars = self.sourceparameterscomp.customParTuples
		self.serializedPars = []

		for page in self.sourceparameterscomp.customPages:
			for par in page.parTuplets:
				self.serializedPars.append(self.parTupleToCppDict(par).copy())

		self.generateHeader(self.serializedPars)
		self.generateCpp(self.serializedPars)

		return

	def parTupleToCppDict(self, parTuple):
		parNameSafe = self.makeParNameCppSafe(parTuple[0].tupletName)
		tupleLength = len(parTuple)
		isMenu = parTuple[0].isMenu
		style = parTuple[0].style

		serializedPar = {
					"par": parTuple,
					"parName": parNameSafe,
					"parLabel": parTuple[0].label,
					"style": style,
					"isMenu": isMenu,
					"numPars": tupleLength,
					"typeDef": self.typesSchema[style, 'parType'].val if not isMenu and tupleLength == 1 else self.typesSchema[style, 'parTupleType'].val if tupleLength > 1 else parNameSafe+'MenuItems',
					"enumDef": self.setupEnumDef(parTuple[0]) if isMenu else ''
				}

		return serializedPar

	def generateHeader(self, serializedPars):
		enumsHeaderContent = '#pragma region Menus\n'
		constNamesLabelsContent = ''
		typeDefsHeaderContent = ''

		for sp in serializedPars:
			constNamesLabelsContent += 'constexpr static char {}Name[] = "{}";\n'.format(sp['parName'], sp['parName'])
			
			if not self.isascii(sp['parLabel']):
				constNamesLabelsContent += 'constexpr static char {}Label[] = u8"{}";\n'.format(sp['parName'], sp['parLabel'])
			else:
				constNamesLabelsContent += 'constexpr static char {}Label[] = "{}";\n'.format(sp['parName'], sp['parLabel'])
			
			constNamesLabelsContent += '\n'

			enumsHeaderContent += sp['enumDef']

			typeDefsHeaderContent += '\t// ' + sp['parLabel'] + '\n' 
			if sp['numPars'] > 1:
				typeDefsHeaderContent += '\tstatic ' + sp['typeDef'].format(str(sp['numPars'])) + '\t\teval' + sp['parName'] + '(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs);\n'
			else:
				typeDefsHeaderContent += '\tstatic ' + sp['typeDef'] + '\t\teval' + sp['parName'] + '(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs);\n'
			
			typeDefsHeaderContent += '\n' 
		
		enumsHeaderContent += '#pragma endregion\n'

		headerOp = op('text_parametersh')
		headerOp.clear()
		headerOp.text = self.parametershTemplate.text % (constNamesLabelsContent, enumsHeaderContent, typeDefsHeaderContent)

		self.toFile(headerOp, self.path, 'Parameters.h')

		return

	def generateCpp(self, serializedPars):
		evalCppContent = ''
		setupCppContent = ''

		for sp in serializedPars:
			if sp['numPars'] > 1:
				if sp['style'] in ['Int', 'Float', 'WH', 'XY', 'XYZ','XYZW']:
					evalCppContent += self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'parTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars']) + '\n'
					evalCppContent += 'Parameters::eval{}(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs)'.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
					evalCppContent += '{\n'
					genArrayList = ' vals' + ', vals'.join(['[' + str(i) + ']' for i in range(sp['numPars'])])
					evalCppContent += codecs.decode(self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'evalTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars'], sp['numPars'], sp['parName'], genArrayList), 'unicode_escape')
					evalCppContent += '}\n'
				else:
					evalCppContent += self.generateSpecificEvalTupleTypeCppCode(sp)

			elif sp['isMenu']:
				evalCppContent += sp['parName']+'MenuItems' + '\n'
				evalCppContent += 'Parameters::eval{}(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs)'.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
				evalCppContent += '{\n'
				evalCppContent += '\treturn ' + self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'evalType'].val.format(sp['parName']+'MenuItems', sp['parName']) + '\n'
				evalCppContent += '}\n'

			else:
				evalCppContent += self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'parType'].val.format(sp['numPars']) + '\n'
				evalCppContent += 'Parameters::eval{}(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs)'.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
				evalCppContent += '{\n'				
				evalCppContent += '\treturn ' + self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'evalType'].val.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
				evalCppContent += '}\n'
			
			evalCppContent += '\n'
	
			setupCppContent += self.setupNumTuple(sp['par']) if sp['numPars'] > 1 else self.setupSinglePar(sp['par'])
			setupCppContent += self.setupType(sp)
			setupCppContent += '\n\t\tassert(res == TD::OP_ParAppendResult::Success);\n\t}\n\n'

		cppOp = op('text_parameterscpp')
		cppOp.clear()
		cppOp.text = self.parameterscppTemplate.text % (evalCppContent, setupCppContent)

		self.toFile(cppOp, self.path, 'Parameters.cpp')

		return

	# Replace with getattr in future update
	def generateSpecificEvalTupleTypeCppCode(self, sp):
		evalCppContent = ''
		if 'RGB' in sp['style']:
			evalCppContent += self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'parTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars']) + '\n'
			evalCppContent += 'Parameters::eval{}(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs)'.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
			evalCppContent += '{\n'
			genArrayList = ' vals' + ', vals'.join(['[' + str(i) + ']' for i in range(sp['numPars'])])
			genArrayReturnList = '(float)vals' + ', (float)vals'.join(['[' + str(i) + ']' for i in range(sp['numPars'])])
			evalCppContent += codecs.decode(self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'evalTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars'], sp['numPars'], sp['parName'], genArrayList, genArrayReturnList), 'unicode_escape')
			evalCppContent += '}\n'
		
		elif 'UV' in sp['style']:
			evalCppContent += self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'parTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars']) + '\n'
			evalCppContent += 'Parameters::eval{}(const TD::OP_Inputs* inputs)'.format(sp['parName']) + '\n'
			evalCppContent += '{\n'
			evalCppContent += codecs.decode(self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'evalTupleType'].val.format(sp['numPars'], sp['parName']), 'unicode_escape')
			evalCppContent += '}\n'

		return evalCppContent

	def setupNumTuple(self, par):
		defaults = ', '.join([str(p.default) for p in par])
		minSliders = ', '.join([str(p.normMin) for p in par])
		maxSliders = ', '.join([str(p.normMax) for p in par])
		minValues = ', '.join([str(p.min) for p in par])
		maxValues = ', '.join([str(p.max) for p in par])
		clampMins = ', '.join([str(p.clampMin) for p in par]).lower()
		clampMaxes = ', '.join([str(p.clampMax) for p in par]).lower()
		
		return op('schemas/tupleParSchema').text % (
			self.makeParNameCppSafe(par[0].tupletName),
			self.makeParNameCppSafe(par[0].tupletName),
			par[0].page,
			len(par),
			defaults,
			minSliders,
			maxSliders,
			minValues,
			maxValues,
			clampMins,
			clampMaxes
		)

	def setupSinglePar(self, par):
		par = par[0]
		if par.isNumber or par.isFloat or par.isInt:
			return self.setupFullNumPar(par)
		elif par.isPulse or par.isMomentary:
			return self.setupBasePar(par)
		elif par.isToggle:
			return self.setupDefaultNumPar(par)
		else:
			return self.setupStringPar(par)

	def setupStringPar(self, par):
		return op('schemas/stringParSchema').text % (str.capitalize(self.makeParNameCppSafe(par.name)), str.capitalize(self.makeParNameCppSafe(par.name)), par.page, par.default)

	def setupFullNumPar(self, par):
		return self.setupDefaultNumPar(par) + op('schemas/fullNumParSchema').text % (par.normMin, par.normMax, par.min, par.max, str(par.clampMin).lower(), str(par.clampMax).lower())

	def setupBasePar(self, par):
		return op('schemas/baseParSchema').text % (str.capitalize(self.makeParNameCppSafe(par.name)), str.capitalize(self.makeParNameCppSafe(par.name)), par.page)

	def setupDefaultNumPar(self, par):
		return self.setupBasePar(par) + '\n' + op('schemas/defaultNumParSchema').text % (str(par.default).lower())

	def setupEnumDef(self, par):
		return op('schemas/enumDefSchema').text % (self.makeParNameCppSafe(par.name)+'MenuItems', '\t' + ',\n\t'.join(par.menuNames)) + '\n'

	def setupType(self, sp):
		setupType = self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'setupType'].val if self.typesSchema[sp['style'], 'setupType'].val != '' else self.typesSchema['DEFAULT', 'setupType'].val

		if sp['style'] in ['Menu', 'StrMenu']:
			setupType = codecs.decode(
				setupType.format(
					len(sp['par'][0].menuNames),
					'{\n\t\t\t' + '"' + '",\n\t\t\t"'.join(sp['par'][0].menuNames) + '"\n\t\t}',
					len(sp['par'][0].menuLabels),
					'{\n\t\t\t' + '"' + '",\n\t\t\t"'.join(sp['par'][0].menuLabels) + '"\n\t\t}',
					'Menu' if sp['style'] == 'Menu' else 'StringMenu'
				), 
				'unicode_escape'
			)
		
		elif sp['style'] in ['Float', 'Int'] and sp['numPars'] > 1:
			setupType = codecs.decode(setupType.format('p, DefaultValues.size()'), 'unicode_escape')
		
		elif sp['style'] in ['Float', 'Int']:
			setupType = codecs.decode(setupType.format('p'), 'unicode_escape')

		else:
			setupType = codecs.decode(setupType.format(sp['style'], 'p'), 'unicode_escape')

		return setupType

	def toFile(self, textDat, path, templateType):
		textDat.save(path + '/' + templateType, createFolders=True)

	def isascii(self, s):
		return len(s) == len(s.encode())

	def makeParNameCppSafe(self, parName):
		if parName == 'Int':
			return 'Int1'
		elif parName == 'Float':
			return 'Float1'
		else:
			return parName
